deploy.startCommand: mkdir -p storage/app/public/galleries storage/app/public/projects storage/app/public/services storage/app/public/materials storage/app/public/settings; php artisan storage:link --force || echo 'storage:link failed'; php artisan migrate --force --no-interaction; php artisan config:cache; php artisan route:cache; php artisan view:cache; php artisan event:cache; php -d post_max_size=32M -d upload_max_filesize=32M -d max_execution_time=300 -S 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-3000} -t public server.php
